rows.label: qev025304_MSG0001
rows.name:
Welcome to Army Pizza! Are
you here to buy a Pizza?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025304_MSG0002
rows.name:
...I'm really sorry, but we're mostly sold out. All
we have left are Frozen Pizzas, is that alright
with you? If it is, I'll sell you one for 1000G.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025304_SEL0021
rows.name: Decline, saying you don't want frozen food.

rows.label: qev025304_MSG0003
rows.name:
Thanks! Even if it's frozen, it's still a
special Pizza made by yours truly, Powell.
I guarantee the taste, so here, take it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025304_MSG0004
rows.name:
Sorry 'bout that. If we just had a little more manpower, I
could bake 'em up and hand 'em to you piping hot... Well,
don't let this discourage you from coming back, alright?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025304_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Hey, wait a minute, you...
You don't have enough money![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025304_MSG0006
rows.name:
If you want to eat our Pizza, scrounge
up exactly 1000G in cash and come back![ST:wait ]
